title: Chocolate Sour Cream Cupcakes
ingredients: nonpareil chocolate candy wafer for garnish
instructions: Melt chocolate in the microwave until smooth.
In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy, about 2 minutes.
Add melted chocolate on low speed.
Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Mix in vanilla and sour cream.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt).
Add dry ingredients to batter alternately with water, mixing until smooth.
Fill cupcake liners and bake at 350°F until a toothpick comes out clean.
For frosting, bring cream, corn syrup, and sugar to a boil in a saucepan.
Remove from heat and add butter, vanilla, and chocolate, stirring until smooth.
Frost cupcakes and garnish with nonpareil chocolate candy wafers.
notes: A variation is to make these as mini-cupcakes in lightly greased mini cupcake tins.
Hundreds of these were made and eaten at Katie and Patrick's wedding reception.
